title: plugin-agent-copilot:plugin-agent
description: This spec defines the Copilot plugin contract for concrete install/uninstall behavior, project install location, and exact frontmatter support so agent skills are usable directly in Copilot workflows.
context: This spec defines the Copilot plugin contract for concrete install/uninstall behavior, project install location, and exact frontmatter support so agent skills are usable directly in Copilot workflows.

rules:
The package MUST export `create(options: PluginLoaderOptions): AgentPlugin` as default or named export.

The factory function MUST read `specd-plugin.json` at the infrastructure boundary to obtain `name` and `version`. It MUST search for the manifest in its own directory first, then the parent directory as fallback. The `type` field MUST remain hardcoded as `'agent'`.

The implementation MUST return a valid `AgentPlugin` that:

- has `type: 'agent'` (hardcoded for type safety)
- has `name` and `version` sourced from `specd-plugin.json` via the factory — not hardcoded in the class
- implements `install(config, options)` and `uninstall(config, options)` with real filesystem behavior, using the provided `SpecdConfig`
- uses a stable frontmatter model for generated skill files

The plugin MUST install skills from `@specd/skills` and inject Copilot-compatible frontmatter into markdown skill files during install.

Installation flow MUST:

1. load requested skills (or all skills when no filter is provided)
2. resolve frontmatter for each skill
3. write files marked as shared to the Copilot shared skills resource directory
4. write files not marked as shared to the installed skill directory
5. prepend frontmatter only to markdown files that are not marked as shared
6. return an `InstallResult` with installed and skipped entries

The Copilot frontmatter contract MUST model and emit this exact supported set:

- required: `name`, `description`
- optional core field: `license`
- optional CLI-supported fields: `allowed-tools`, `user-invocable`, `disable-model-invocation`

Fields outside this set MUST NOT be emitted by default.

Project-level skill installation MUST target `.github/skills/` under the `projectRoot` provided in `SpecdConfig`.

For each skill, files not marked as shared MUST be installed under `.github/skills/<skill-name>/`.

Files marked as shared MUST be installed under `.github/skills/_specd-shared/`. This shared directory MUST NOT contain a `SKILL.md` file.

`uninstall(config: SpecdConfig, options?: AgentInstallOptions)` MUST remove installed skill directories from `.github/skills/` relative to `config.projectRoot`.

When `options.skills` is provided, uninstall MUST remove only the selected specd-managed skill directories. The shared resource directory MUST remain in place because other installed skills may still reference it.

When `options.skills` is omitted, uninstall MUST remove all specd-managed skill directories and `_specd-shared/`.

Uninstall MUST NOT remove unrelated directories or files under `.github/skills/` that are not part of the specd-managed skill set.

constraints: The plugin MUST depend on @specd/skills for skill operations.
The plugin MUST implement concrete install and uninstall behavior.
name and version MUST be read from specd-plugin.json by the factory and passed to the plugin constructor — never hardcoded in the class.
type MUST remain hardcoded as 'agent' for type safety.

scenarios.name: Exposes plugin factory
then: create() is available and returns an AgentPlugin

scenarios.name: Factory reads manifest for name and version
then: the returned plugin has name === "@specd/plugin-agent-copilot" and version === "1.0.0"

scenarios.name: Type is hardcoded
then: the returned plugin has type === 'agent'

scenarios.name: Created plugin satisfies runtime contract
then: the returned plugin has type: 'agent' (hardcoded)
AND the returned plugin has name and version sourced from specd-plugin.json
AND the returned plugin exposes install(config, options) and uninstall(config, options) functions using SpecdConfig

scenarios.name: Install injects frontmatter and reports outcome
when: install(projectRoot, options) runs with a selected skill set
then: installed markdown skill files include Copilot-compatible frontmatter prepended before content
AND the install result reports installed and skipped entries

scenarios.name: Install routes shared files to the shared directory
given: a resolved bundle contains files marked as shared and non-shared
then: shared files are written under .github/skills/_specd-shared/
AND non-shared files are written under .github/skills/<skill-name>/
AND frontmatter is not prepended to shared files

scenarios.name: Copilot emitter supports full declared field set
when: frontmatter is generated for a skill file
then: name and description are always emitted
AND license, allowed-tools, user-invocable, and disable-model-invocation are emitted only when configured
AND unsupported keys are excluded

scenarios.name: Skills are written under GitHub skills directory
then: files are created only under .github/skills/ within the target project root

scenarios.name: Shared directory is not discovered as a skill
then: the directory does not contain a SKILL.md file

scenarios.name: Uninstall removes selected skill directories and keeps shared resources
given: multiple skills are installed and share .github/skills/_specd-shared/
then: only .github/skills/specd/ is removed
AND .github/skills/_specd-shared/ remains

scenarios.name: Uninstall without filter removes only specd-managed skills and shared resources
given: specd-managed skills and unrelated user skills are installed under .github/skills/
then: all specd-managed skill directories are removed
AND .github/skills/_specd-shared/ is removed
AND unrelated user skill directories remain
